Job poster

About the job

Senior Software Engineer - AI

Type: Permanent, Full-Time
Location: London (Hybrid, 3 days/week)
Salary: £140,000 - £150,000 base + bonus

Infused Solutions has partnered with a growth-stage FinTech providing intelligent automation and decision support systems for finance teams. We're hiring Software Engineers to own end-to-end delivery of production AI platforms.

You'll be responsible for significant components - from architecture through shipping, monitoring, and iteration based on real client feedback.

Ideal Profile
  • 4-8 years commercial experience shipping production systems at scale
  • Led or owned a significant component, pod, or feature line - responsible for delivery, not just execution
  • Two or more of: startup experience, consulting/client-focused background, AI/ML systems delivery, financial services domain
  • Senior mindset: can move fast, can wear multiple hats, has good taste in technical decisions
  • Production focus: real systems, real reliability, real impact

Nice to have: Python, FastAPI, React, agentic workflows, RAG, document intelligence. But we care more about what you've shipped than the languages.

We value:
  • Engineers who ship production systems and own their reliability
  • Understanding of client workflows and the ability to design for them
  • Pattern recognition (bespoke problem → reusable platform solution)
  • Leadership at the engineering level
  • Technical judgment and taste

If you're interested in learning more about the role, please reach out to Harvey Moran for an immediate CV review and conversation.

About the company

Infused Solutions
38,270 followers
Staffing and Recruiting 11-50 employees 5 on LinkedIn

Infused solutions are a leading Technology recruitment business which has experience in providing contract, permanent and search solutions to organisations. We have extensive experience in Software Development, Cloud, Business Intelligence, Data, Project Management & Senior Appointments.

With great knowledge and understanding of the sector we provide innovative and tailored solutions to help organisations find the best Tech talent available.


We have a team of recruitment experts with a proven track record of matching the right people to the right organisations, delivering mutual benefits that align with the clients’ business challenges and long-term goals.

Our clients range from large multi-nationals to home-grown startups. We provide each client with a flexible and tailored solution, building a long-term partnership which enables your business to grow the way you want it to. …
